case_title: FRANK PHILIP H. VS HENNING EDWARD et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HENNING EDWARD
UNABLE TO SERVE BY THE SHERIFF.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FRANK PHILIP H. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HENNING EDWARD $4,518.67 PRINCIPAL, $39.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,557.67, EDWARD HENNING IS THE ONLY PERSON SERVED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
